open_deferrals.item: Credentialed OpenAI acceptance smoke and S20 readiness/maintainability reruns.
open_deferrals.why: S21 proves the deterministic provider-envelope boundary only. A real credentialed result must remain inside S20's preserved immutable lifecycle and exact semantic base, after fresh S21 verification, so no fake endpoint or planning artefact is presented as S20 evidence.
open_deferrals.tracking: S20-v015-parity-portable-fixture after fresh S21-openai-structured-envelope verifier PASS.
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: The Coach-directed replan requires S20 to remain blocked until fresh S21 PASS, then requires a separate S20 readiness and maintainability rerun plus credentialed OpenAI smoke returning an accepted emitted check: ac-satisfaction.

effort_complexity.rationale: The provider-specific wire correction must remain precisely bounded below a verified generic semantic gate while proving both OpenAI formats, fail-closed rejection, and non-OpenAI non-interference.

release_benefit: Lets exact Baton generic-check semantics remain fail-closed when OpenAI strict-output transport cannot accept the canonical conditional schema.

design_decisions.choice: Compile only the exact generic llm-check-report-v1 input into one named OpenAI strict envelope below the unchanged S04 semantic gate.
options: closed-world exact-id-plus-digest OpenAI envelope with retained local canonical validation
change the vendored canonical schema or prompt
apply a generic strict-schema mutation or unconstrained fallback across providers
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under the Coach's standing orchestration authority during the 2026-07-17 replan as a non-Type-1 technical correction. S04 remains verified and immutable; S20 remains blocked with its existing evidence preserved.
design_decisions.rationale: The provider rejects the canonical allOf schema before model emission, while an exact envelope can satisfy only the transport subset and still leave the canonical schema and requested/emitted identity gate as authoritative postconditions.

positive_scenarios: Both retained OpenAI structured-output wire formats accept the deterministic envelope and return a model-emitted canonical ac-satisfaction object that passes the existing local gate.
negative_scenarios: Digest mismatch, unknown report-family identity, spec-ambiguity, invalid canonical semantics, provider-profile mismatch, tool-call paths, and missing fresh S21 verification all fail closed without a synthetic report, an HTTP request where prohibited, or an S20 resume.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: A narrow transport adapter removes the provider's pre-emission incompatibility without making provider acceptance a substitute for Baton semantics.
